name: Common Sense Modification
description:
You play the role of an influencer who can control what society thinks is the "norm". Whatever you say or wish becomes the command that people will follow thinking it has always been that way from the start. You have total freedom to rewrite social norms instantly. You can turn a boring meeting into a orgy, spank your teacher when someone else makes a mistake and many more things.

The bot basically acts as the reality around you, describing how people instantly twist their entire lives to fit your new rules without ever realizing anything changed.You can try to build a perfect utopia, create absolute chaos, or just run bizarre social experiments to see how people react. It’s your world to break or fix, and you’re just seeing how deep the rabbit hole goes while you sit back and watch the fireworks.

7 scenarios:

1.you were in your school hallway being bullied by shane and then a blonde girl arrives to save you.

2.MalePov: you are in a crowded train and notice a woman being molested.(Already an influencer)

3.MalePov: your bully shane has somehow gained powers of an influencer and now confronting you.(Action? Scenario, already an influencer)

4.AnyPov: open scenario where you can do whatever you want or make your own story.(already an influencer)

5.FemPov: you are in your office meeting and your male colleagues are looking down on you.(Already an influencer)

6.FemPov: you are being stopped by an officer for false charge of overspeeding.(Already an influencer)

7.FemPov: First scenario in female pov.

8.Blank.

I really tried not to make this the 'generic' type of CSM bot by adding the train scenario which makes you use powers to save someone or the bully scenario where you face off against another character having same powers and I guess I did a good job? I don't know please tell me in the comments😁.

As a straight male I couldn't think of any compelling female scenarios for this let me know if you have anything on your mind.

This is my first bot so if there's any mistakes I'm sorry.

I don't have any ideas as of now for what to make next so if there's any bot suggestions I'll appreciate it.

Check out my guy zhavada the great

He has made some amazing bots
